name: Nitro Krypt King
description: Nitro Krypt King is the Nitro counterpart of Krypt King in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Nitro Krypt King is the Nitro counterpart of Krypt King in Skylanders: Trap Team. He is a Knight Spirit possessing Arkeyan Armor who serves as a Trap Master of the Undead element.
personality: As a powerful Knight Spirit in Arkeyan Armor, Nitro Krypt King is a disciplined and formidable warrior dedicated to defending Skylands.

story.content: Nitro Krypt King is the Nitro counterpart of Krypt King in Skylanders: Trap Team.

trivia: He is the only Nitro variant that is not a character with a speed attack. This doesn't apply to when playing as him in the 3DS version of Trap Team, where every Skylander including Nitro Krypt King can sprint.
In Skylanders: SuperChargers, Nitro Krypt King's blue dots on the front of his helmet become red, which match with his original counterpart's.

trailers.name: Meet the Skylanders Nitro Krypt King

gameplay: Nitro Krypt King is a Trap Master who utilizes a massive Traptanium Broadsword for close-quarters combat. He can also summon a swarm of insects to damage enemies from a distance and possesses upgrades that enhance his armor and sword with haunted properties.

basic.name: Traptanium Broadsword
basic.content: Nitro Krypt King wields his massive Traptanium Broadsword to deliver powerful melee strikes to enemies.

basic.name: The Swarm
basic.content: Summons a swarm of insects to plague and damage nearby foes.

basic_upgrades.name: Haunted Sword
basic_upgrades.content: Enhances the Broadsword with haunted energy for increased damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Enchanted Armor
basic_upgrades.content: Provides additional defense and protection during battle.

basic_upgrades.name: Stunning Sting
basic_upgrades.content: Adds a stunning effect to sword attacks, momentarily dazing enemies.
